name: Pasta and Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan.
2. Whisk in the flour and stir until smooth and thickened.
3. Gradually add the heavy cream and white wine, stirring constantly until smooth.
4. Add dill (or preferred herbs), pine nuts, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. If needed, thin the sauce with additional cream.
6. Toss the sauce with the prepared pasta noodles.
This sauce is also delicious served over fish.
